category.name: AI Coding Assistants
category.description: AI-powered coding tools, IDEs, and development assistants

tools.name: Cursor
tools.shortDescription: AI-first code editor built for developers
tools.description: Cursor is an AI-first code editor designed for developers. It offers code generation, debugging, refactoring, and context-aware suggestions. It integrates with popular development workflows and supports multiple programming languages.
cons: Not as mature as VSCode ecosystem
tools.bestFor: Software development, debugging, refactoring, and AI-assisted coding
